verses.2: For he grew up before him as a tender plant,
verses.4: Surely he has borne our sickness
verses.5: But he was pierced for our transgressions.
verses.6: All we like sheep have gone astray.
verses.8: He was taken away by oppression and judgment.
verses.9: They made his grave with the wicked,
verses.10: Yet it pleased the LORD to bruise him.
verses.11: After the suffering of his soul,
verses.12: Therefore I will give him a portion with the great.
